SHORT NAME: EMER_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 

LONG NAME: EMER_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 when the description associated with the provider ID number explicitly references an 
emergency services provider (e.g., Emergency Care, urgent care, etc.) based on the following 
assignment: 

1= PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” and taxonomy value is (“207P00000X,”
